Name: Pict Template
Tagline: Template handler base class for extending Pict with custom expression types
Icon:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96" width="96" height="96">
		<defs>
			<clipPath id="frame-pict-template-filled-light">
				<path d="M 2 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 94 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 2 48 Z"/>
			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 2 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 94 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 2 48 Z" fill="#19d3ec"/>
		<g clip-path="url(#frame-pict-template-filled-light)"><path d="M 16 70 L 48 30 L 80 70 Z" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/>
					<path d="M 24 80 L 48 52 L 72 80 Z" fill="#e0419e" opacity="0.9"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
			font-size="38" font-weight="700"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">PT</text>
	</svg>
